body.title: Reader provenance — wire reading_runs, model tracking, deposit metadata
body.result: All reader deposit points now carry model_used, source_title, source_author, inference_tier, campaign_id. Fixed 501 reading_list status mismatches. Removed 279 spam entries.
body.description:
The reader deposits 8800+ memories with source='reading' and no other provenance. reading_runs/reading_run_items tables exist but have zero rows — infrastructure built, never connected.

## Problems
1. No model_used tracking — two expensive reading passes (one Qwen, one DeepSeek) are indistinguishable
2. reading_runs/reading_run_items never populated despite having the right columns
3. reading_list status lies — completed_at set but status still 'queued'
4. Duplicate entries (Making Money x2, Pratchett titles x2)
5. Memory metadata at deposit carries no book title, author, model, pass, or chunk reference

## Fix
1. Wire drain_learn_queue.py / reading_engine.py to create reading_runs and populate reading_run_items
2. Pass model_used through inference to memory deposit metadata
3. Each deposited memory gets metadata: source_title, source_author, source_path, model_used, pass_id, inference_tier, chunk_ref, deposited_by
4. Fix reading_list status management (completed_at must update status)
5. Deduplicate reading_list entries

## Depends on
- T-provenance-coverage-enforcement (sprint first — establishes the metadata contract)

## Related
- T-experiment-findings-log — experiment results need to be findable too
